flags.description: Simulate the execution without changing state
flags.name: --dry-run

flags.description: Version of the Keycloak container image to deploy (default "24.0.4")
flags.name: --keycloak-version string

flags.description: Remove Keycloak and strip the OIDC configuration from Vault
flags.name: -d, --disable

flags.description: Deploy Keycloak and fully configure Vault OIDC auth
flags.name: -e, --enable

flags.description: Force a clean redeployment of the OIDC environment
flags.name: -f, --force
